name: AI_SOC_Responder
author: SOC-AI-Analyst
description: Proposes D3FEND-mapped response actions for a TheHive case based on its mitre:Txxxx tags. Never executes anything automatically — firewall/EDR/identity adapters are not wired to real systems yet. Analyst-triggered only, by design.

configurationItems.name: thehive_url
configurationItems.description: Base URL of the TheHive instance, e.g. http://thehive:9000

configurationItems.name: thehive_apikey
configurationItems.description: TheHive API key. Needs case-fetch access, and task/task-log write access if write_back_to_case is enabled.

configurationItems.name: write_back_to_case
configurationItems.description: If true, create a task + task log on the case with the proposed plan, in addition to the Cortex report.
